baseline.command: RCH_WORKER=ovh-a RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-4mwsj-baseline-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/matmul_256x256_complex128_dense --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 4 --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_WORKER=ovh-a RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-4mwsj-candidate-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/matmul_256x256_complex128_dense --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 4 --noplot

parity.reason: The candidate decomposed complex matmul into four independent real GEMMs and combined completed sums, which reassociates floating-point additions versus the existing ascending-l complex_mul recurrence.
parity.golden_sha256: not retained; source rejected before shipping

verdict: Reject. Candidate regressed on the same RCH worker and violates absolute FP-bit parity.
